privileged_info_summary: The task parameters are synthetically generated via the setup_task.sh script, which injects explicit instructions into artemis_tli_spec.txt. It is verified that the target script path is /home/ga/GMAT_output/artemis_free_return.script and the results path is /home/ga/GMAT_output/free_return_results.txt. The task explicitly requires targeting a TLI Prograde Delta-V between 3.0 and 3.3 km/s (consistent with a typical LEO-to-Moon transfer), a Lunar Flyby Radius (RMAG) of 4000.0 km, and an Earth Reentry Radius (RMAG) of 6411.14 km. These requirements match the metadata claims exactly. The 5.0 km tolerance is confirmed as the evaluation threshold in verifier.py (compared to the 1.0 km GMAT targeter tolerance specified in the prompt).
